title: Tissue Lysis and Digestion for MS Analysis
author: David Kotol
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.yguftww

steps.title: Incubate adapter of the Tissue Lyser...
steps.instruction: Incubate adapter of the Tissue Lyser on dry ice for 00:30:00 Tissue Lyser LT (QIAGEN, 85600, Bead mill, https://www.qiagen.com/us/shop/automated-solutions/sample-disruption/tissuelyser-lt/#orderinginformation )

steps.title: Add one 3mm bead to the...
steps.instruction: Add one 3mm bead to the tissue sample and incubate on dry ice for 00:30:00 Tungsten Carbide Beads, 3 mm (QIAGEN, 69997, Beads for use with Tissue Lyser systems, https://www.qiagen.com/se/shop/automated-solutions/accessories/beads/#orderinginformation )

steps.title: Disrupt the tissue using the Tissue...
steps.instruction: Disrupt the tissue using the Tissue Lyser for 00:02:00 Tissue Lyser LT (QIAGEN, 85600, Bead mill, https://www.qiagen.com/us/shop/automated-solutions/sample-disruption/tissuelyser-lt/#orderinginformation )

steps.title: Add 250 µL of Lysis Buffer...
steps.instruction: Add 250 µL of Lysis Buffer (7M Urea, 2M Thiourea, 2% SDC)

steps.title: Homogenize the tissue using the Tissue...
steps.instruction: Homogenize the tissue using the Tissue Lyser for 00:02:00 Tissue Lyser LT (QIAGEN, 85600, Bead mill, https://www.qiagen.com/us/shop/automated-solutions/sample-disruption/tissuelyser-lt/#orderinginformation )

steps.title: Centrifuge for 00:30:00 at 20,000 × g at 4 °C
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 00:30:00 at 20,000 × g at 4 °C

steps.title: Precipitate the proteins with 4 volumes...
steps.instruction: Precipitate the proteins with 4 volumes of ice-cold acetone and incubate in -20 °C over night

steps.title: Centrifuge at 20,000 × g at...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 20,000 × g at 4 °C for 00:30:00 and discard the supernatant

steps.title: Wash the pellet two times with...
steps.instruction: Wash the pellet two times with 400 µL of ice-cold acetone followed by centrifugation at 20,000 × g at 4 °C for 00:10:00 00:10:00

steps.title: Remove the acetone excess and dry the pellet
steps.instruction: Remove the acetone excess and dry the pellet

steps.title: Dissolve the pellet in 200 µL...
steps.instruction: Dissolve the pellet in 200 µL of Pellet Solubilizer (7M Urea, 2M Thiourea)

steps.title: Dilute 8 times with 100 millimolar...
steps.instruction: Dilute 8 times with 100 millimolar (mM) TEAB and measure protein concentration using Bio-Rad Protein assay according to the manufacturers instructions Bio-Rad Protein Assay Bio-Rad Laboratories Catalog #5000001

steps.title: Take volume that corresponds to 15...
steps.instruction: Take volume that corresponds to 15 µg of proteins and add QPrESTs mixture

steps.title: Add DTT to a final concentration...
steps.instruction: Add DTT to a final concentration of 10 millimolar (mM) and incubate 01:00:00 at 30 °C

steps.title: Add CAA to a final concentration...
steps.instruction: Add CAA to a final concentration of 50 millimolar (mM) and incubate 00:30:00 in the dark at room temperature

steps.title: Add 300 ng of Pierce Trypsin...
steps.instruction: Add 300 ng of Pierce Trypsin protease and incubate over night at 37 °C

steps.title: Quench the digestion with TFA to...
steps.instruction: Quench the digestion with TFA to a final concentration of 0.5% (v/v)

steps.title: Prepare one StageTip per sample by...
steps.instruction: Prepare one StageTip per sample by inserting 3 layers of Empore Cation Extraction Discs in a 200uL tip Empore Discs (47mm cation extraction disks, 3M, 2251-1, https://www.sterlitech.com/empore-disks-cation-exchange-sr-2251-1.html )

steps.title: Activate membrane with 50 µL 100%...
steps.instruction: Activate membrane with 50 µL 100% MeOH, spin at 1000 x g for 00:01:00

steps.title: Equilibrate StageTip with 50 µL Wash Buffer (30% MeOH, 0
steps.instruction: Equilibrate StageTip with 50 µL Wash Buffer (30% MeOH, 0.1% FA), spin at 1000 x g for 00:01:00

steps.title: Apply sample to the StageTip, spin...
steps.instruction: Apply sample to the StageTip, spin at 1000 x g for 00:01:00

steps.title: Wash two times with 30 µL...
steps.instruction: Wash two times with 30 µL Wash Buffer (30% MeOH, 0.1% FA), spin at 1000 x g for 00:01:00 00:01:00

steps.title: Elute two times with 20 µL...
steps.instruction: Elute two times with 20 µL Elution Buffer (30% MeOH, 1.65% NH 4 OH), spin at 1000 x g for 00:01:00 00:01:00

steps.title: Vacuum dry for 00:30:00 at 42...
steps.instruction: Vacuum dry for 00:30:00 at 42 °C and store at -20 °C until MS-analysis

steps.title: For MS analysis, dissolve samples in...
steps.instruction: For MS analysis, dissolve samples in Solvent A and inject 1.75 ug
